steps.t: Suitable stone can be found in and around after-battle Osgiliath. Suitable water can be found along the Anduin nearby. You should collect some stone f…
You should talk to Arandol, who can be found at the after-battle Cross-roads.
The statue is at the after-battle Cross-roads. You should clean the Gondorian posts around the Statue of the Fallen King.
The statue is at the after-battle Cross-roads. You should clean the Statue of the Fallen King.
